name: Okatse Canyon
summary: A canyon tour with a long hanging trail and panoramic viewpoints for adventure seekers.
description: Okatse Canyon is known for elevated walkways, forest approach tours, and dramatic views over deep terrain.
details: Okatse Canyon is located in the territory of Gordi village in Khoni municipality.
It is especially attractive for visitors who enjoy active and extreme-style walking tours, often taking 2-3 hours.
The visitor tour passes through Dadiani historic forest, includes a hanging trail section of about 780 meters, and ends at a panoramic viewpoint.
A smart selfie camera point is installed near the panoramic area for visitor photos.
